events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes an electrical termination/splice with insufficient torque detected via thermal imaging (IR modality). This is a loose connection causing heating. NEC 110.14 requires terminations to be properly tightened. Insufficient torque is a defect - loose connection, non-compliant, installed-defective. This is a fire hazard, high risk. Decision should be fail.
